title: Batch 7 Pluggy Pytest Reproduction Summary Tool
actualExecutionPerformed: Cloned the public pluggy repository, installed the checked-out package in editable mode, inventoried pytest-style tests with AST and grep baselines, then ran the repository testing target through pytest.
baselineOrManualComparison: Simple grep found 107 def-test lines; the AST inventory found 107 test definitions.
whatSovrynLearned: The summarizer can create a public-safe reconciliation between static inventory and execution counts, but it must be marked limited because dynamic parametrization means static definitions do not equal runtime cases.
hardQuestionAnswer: Existing tools were not enough for repo/test/result extraction or reproduction-analysis problem; Sovryn built pytest_repro_summary, used it on pytest-dev/pluggy repository test suite, and learned: The summarizer can create a public-safe reconciliation between static inventory and execution counts, but it must be marked limited because dynamic parametrization means static definitions do not equal runtime cases.
humanReadableSummary: Cloned the public pluggy repository, installed the checked-out package in editable mode, inventoried pytest-style tests with AST and grep baselines, then ran the repository testing target through pytest. The repository test run returned code 0 with 126 passing runtime cases. AST and grep agreed on static definitions, while runtime cases were higher due to test expansion.
